text: Artificial intelligence is becoming part of our daily lives, from recommendation systems to hiring algorithms. However, we must consider the ethics behind it. One major issue is bias: if the data used to train AI contains biases, the system may make unfair decisions. For example, an AI for job applications could favour certain groups. This raises questions about fairness and equality. Privacy is also vital, as many AIs collect personal data. Transparency means we need to understand how AI reaches its conclusions. Finally, responsible AI development ensures that creators consider these risks, testing systems thoroughly and involving diverse perspectives. Only then can we build trustworthy technology.
